com.tonic.jaloc.impl.sets

Class PBoolSet

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.tonic.jaloc.memory.abs.AbstractNativeCollection<PLongArray,PLongWriter>
      • com.tonic.jaloc.impl.sets.PBoolSet
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    java.lang.AutoCloseable

    public final class PBoolSet
extends AbstractNativeCollection<PLongArray,PLongWriter>
    A bool set over a single-word bitmap.

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      PBoolSet()
      Creates an empty set on the system allocator.
      PBoolSet(NativeAllocator allocator)
      Creates an empty set on the given allocator.

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description

      Adds value.
      void clear()
      Empties the set.
      boolean contains(boolean value)
      Tests whether value is present.
      boolean remove(boolean value)
      Removes value.

      • PBoolSet

        public PBoolSet()
        Creates an empty set on the system allocator.

        Adds value.

        Returns:

        Removes value.

        value - the value to remove
        Returns:
        true if the set changed

        Tests whether value is present.
        Parameters:
        value - the value to test
        Returns:
        true if present
        Throws:
        java.lang.IllegalStateException - if closed

      • clear

        public void clear()
        Empties the set.
